summary: Iteration 11 testing complete - All 10 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified. Features tested: 1) GET /api/support/messages works for admin (uses support_messages permission), 2) GET /api/support/messages/count works for admin, 3) GET /api/projects/types returns correct project type mapping (connections vs reports), 4) PUT /api/settings/personal-theme saves and returns correctly, 5) GET /api/auth/me returns personal_theme field, 6) Medhat has 0 invoices (stuck invoice deleted), 7) Settings page has 2-column grid layout, 8) Admin sidebar projects go to correct page type based on projectTypes API, 9) ConnectionsHub shows only connections (no reports section), 10) HR CRUD still works.
critical_code_review_comments: Support messages GET endpoint (line 10235-10266) correctly checks 'support_messages' permission instead of hardcoded usernames
Support messages count endpoint (line 10269-10287) also uses support_messages permission
Projects types API (line 1270-1292) correctly determines project type based on user permissions (water_connections/sewage_connections → connections, reports_view/reports_add → reports)
Layout.js (line 416-421) fetches projectTypes and uses it for admin sidebar links
Layout.js (line 1051-1057, 1249-1255) uses projectTypes to determine link destination (connections-hub vs reports)
App.js (line 101-104) applies personal theme with setTimeout(100) to ensure it overrides platform theme
Settings.js has max-w-6xl container with grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 layout for 2-column display
ConnectionsHub.js shows only connections section (water + sewage) without reports section
seed_data_creation: Test HR employee created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 features fully tested. Key changes verified: 1) Support messages endpoints use support_messages permission (not hardcoded admin). 2) GET /api/projects/types returns {project_name: 'connections'|'reports'} based on user permissions. 3) Layout.js fetches projectTypes and uses it for admin sidebar links. 4) App.js applies personal theme with setTimeout(100). 5) Settings.js has 2-column grid layout. 6) ConnectionsHub shows only connections (no reports section). 7) Medhat's stuck invoice was deleted (0 invoices now).

tests_performed.details: Returns correct mapping: 'مشروع إصلاح أعمال المحافظات الغربية': 'connections', 'مشروع إصلاح أعمال المحافظات الشمالية': 'reports', etc.
Create, list, update, delete all work
Screenshot confirms 2-column layout with platform settings and theme settings side by side
Screenshot confirms only water and sewage connection cards, no reports section
Layout.js uses projectTypes API to determine link destination (connections-hub vs reports)
